# Henrique Bonfim - Senior Software Engineer

> Personal portfolio and professional website
> Contact: henriquebonfim@proton.me
> Location: Campo Grande, MS, Brazil
> Website: https://henriquebonfim.web.app

## About Henrique Bonfim
Senior Software Engineer with 8+ years of experience specializing in backend development with Python and TypeScript on Node.js. Proven expertise in microservices, serverless, and event-driven architectures. Demonstrated success across startups, fintech, solar energy, and B2B sectors. Skilled in system design and AI integration.

## Certifications
- AWS Certified Cloud Practitioner (2023)
- Google Cloud Certified Associate Cloud Engineer (2024)
- Google Cloud Certified Professional Cloud Architect (2026)
- Scrum Foundation Professional Certification (SFPC)
- AWS re/Start Graduate

## Technical Skills
- **Languages**: TypeScript, Python, JavaScript, Java, PHP
- **Backend**: Node.js, Nest.js, Express, FastAPI, Ruby on Rails
- **Frontend**: React, Next.js, Angular, Vue.js
- **Databases**: PostgreSQL, MySQL, MongoDB, Redis, QuestDB
- **Cloud**: AWS, Google Cloud Platform (GCP), Firebase
- **DevOps**: Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD, Terraform
- **AI/ML**: GPT-4, Claude, LangChain, TensorFlow, IBM Watson
- **Message Queues**: RabbitMQ, Redis Pub/Sub
- **Architecture**: Microservices, Serverless, Event-Driven, REST APIs

## Key Projects
- **AI-Powered Stock Analysis Bot** - Python, Next.js, GPT-4, Monte Carlo simulations
- **KYC Microservice** - Nest.js, PostgreSQL, RabbitMQ, GPT-4/Claude integration
- **IoT Automation System (ArduEVE)** - Node.js, Vue.js, MongoDB, Arduino, Docker Swarm
- **Blockchain Legal Contracts (Mideal)** - Node.js, Angular, Google Cloud, Top 50 Megahack v2 2020
- **Food Donation Platform (Roça Eats)** - Node.js, Angular, AWS, Hackatrouble SP 2020 Winner
- **Observability Stack** - OpenTelemetry, Prometheus, Loki, Tempo, Grafana, Traefik
- **Ollama LLM Server** - Scalable local LLM deployment with API interface
- **UltraDL** - High-performance video downloader (Python backend)

## Education
Federal University of Mato Grosso do Sul (UFMS)
Bachelor's in Information Systems (2015-2019)

## Website Technical Stack
- **Framework**: React 19 with Vite 7
- **Language**: TypeScript 5
- **Styling**: Tailwind CSS 4, DaisyUI 5
- **Runtime**: Bun
- **I18n**: LinguiJS (en, pt, es)
- **Features**: PWA, SEO optimized, Dark/Light mode
- **Performance**: WebP images, Brotli compression, lazy loading
- **Accessibility**: WCAG compliant, semantic HTML, ARIA labels
